creator: utisoft@googlemail.com
text:
On 13 February 2010 12:37, b. f. <bf1783@googlemail.com> wrote:
>>Looks like Rob Farmer (I'm guessing aka b.f.) did a load of the work
>> I've been doing, and created a load of ports for the dependencies
>> (more quickly too :S)
>
> Why is it that millionaire playboy Rob Farmer, and the Caped Crusader,
> b.f., have never been seen together, in the same place at the same
> time? =A0;) =A0No, Rob is his own man, and not (at least that I am aware
> of) my alter-ego. =A0I guess he didn't know of your own plans for
> scilab5.
>
> I was busy dealing with something else, and haven't submitted the
> patches for 4.x. =A0Do you want me to do so, or should we just try to
> get 5.x into the tree?
>

I don't mind requesting that scilab5 be a different port, or better if
you were to submit your patches as scilab4, and scilab refers to
scilab5 if you get what I mean...

That seems to be the usual way of doing it; scilab being the latest version=
.

Chris
